purpose: Single machine-readable ForgeUI component registry for forge-app-design generation and audits. This is the source of truth for component selection semantics inside the Forge App Design plugin.
compositionDoctrine: DataTable cells: always start from the Cell* primitive that matches the field shape. Only fall back to Avatar + custom composition when no Cell* primitive can express the field, and the gap MUST be logged in FORGEUI-GAPS.md.

Toolbars / filter strips: always start from Toolbar + ToolbarSearchInput + ToolbarSelectDropdown + ToolbarDatepicker + ToolbarPillTabs + ToolbarShowSelect. Do not build a rounded white shell around bare <input> / <select>.
AppLayout owns sidebar / topbar / breadcrumbs / primaryAction. Page bodies never re-implement that shell.

components.name: ActivityCard
constraints: Use Forge tokens, inherited parent width, and component props before custom markup.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: Compact activity card with title + datetime + body.

components.name: AppLayout
constraints: Use profilePosition="topbar" for Protask-style admin apps.
Only surfaceRole=navigation routes enter menuItems.
Use breadcrumbs + primaryAction + secondaryAction for detail and action pages.
Forbidden: Do not rebuild sidebar/topbar/profile in page.tsx.
Forbidden: Do not add extra max-w-* / p-6 / p-8 wrappers around the page root.
Forbidden: Do not put /new, /edit, [id], or audit routes in menuItems.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: Admin application shell with sidebar, topbar, team switcher, notifications, and profile.
requiredUsage: Use profilePosition="topbar" for Protask-style admin apps.
Use breadcrumbs + primaryAction + secondaryAction for detail and action pages.
forbiddenUsage: Do not rebuild sidebar/topbar/profile in page.tsx.
Do not add extra max-w-* / p-6 / p-8 wrappers around the page root.
Do not put /new, /edit, [id], or audit routes in menuItems.

components.name: Avatar
constraints: When used in non-DataTable surfaces, pair with semantic Forge identity components (ProfileCard, HistoryItem variant=profile, ContactItem).
components.purpose: Identity anchor for people, organizations, queues, and records.
requiredUsage: When used in non-DataTable surfaces, pair with semantic Forge identity components (ProfileCard, HistoryItem variant=profile, ContactItem).

components.name: BarChartStatCard
constraints: Use Forge tokens, inherited parent width, and component props before custom markup.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: Metric card with small bar chart trend.

components.name: Button
avoidFor: long labels that should be links or menu items
constraints: Use variant, color, and size props before custom button CSS.
Use IconButton for icon-only controls.
Keep primary actions singular per surface unless the workflow explicitly needs split actions.
Do not force fixed pixel width; allow parent layout or w-full form usage to control width.
components.purpose: Primary and secondary command button.

components.name: ButtonGroup
avoidFor: more than five options in one group
constraints: Forbidden: Do not rely on flex-wrap to cram 6-8 options into one segmented control.
components.purpose: Short segmented filter or mode switch.
avoidWhen: more than five options in one group
forbiddenUsage: Do not rely on flex-wrap to cram 6-8 options into one segmented control.

components.name: CellActions
constraints: Forbidden: Do not stack two text buttons (Preview + Open) in every row; use one CellLink plus CellActions.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: Row action cluster (mail/phone/chat/eye/pen/trash) plus optional kebab.
forbiddenUsage: Do not stack two text buttons (Preview + Open) in every row; use one CellLink plus CellActions.

components.name: CellCode
constraints: Use Forge tokens, inherited parent width, and component props before custom markup.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: Monospaced-shape semibold code/identifier cell.

components.name: CellFile
constraints: Use Forge tokens, inherited parent width, and component props before custom markup.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: File identity cell with file-type icon, name, and optional size.

components.name: CellImageText
avoidFor: identity without image, use CellTextSubtitle instead
constraints: rounded="full" for people; rounded="lg" for org/product/file.
Forbidden: Do not re-implement avatar + title + subtitle by hand inside a DataTable column.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: Identity cell with avatar/logo plus title and subtitle in the Forge h-10 row.
avoidWhen: identity without image, use CellTextSubtitle instead
requiredUsage: rounded="full" for people; rounded="lg" for org/product/file.
forbiddenUsage: Do not re-implement avatar + title + subtitle by hand inside a DataTable column.

components.name: CellKebabMenu
recommendedFor: row menus when no inline actions are needed
constraints: Use Forge tokens, inherited parent width, and component props before custom markup.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: Single kebab-menu action cell.
bestFor: row menus when no inline actions are needed

constraints: Use Forge tokens, inherited parent width, and component props before custom markup.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: Inline link-styled row action with arrow-up-right icon.

components.name: CellMuted
constraints: Use Forge tokens, inherited parent width, and component props before custom markup.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.

Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.

components.name: ChartCard
constraints: Default width fills the parent grid/flex column.
Use width="fixed" or size=4col/6col/8col only in component showcases, never generated app routes.
If width and size are both present, width is the authoritative layout mode; size is only a legacy fixed-width preset.
Let the parent grid define responsive column behavior with minmax(0,1fr), clamp rails, and gap-4/gap-5.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: White outlined chart surface for trends, status mix, and dashboard analysis panels.
requiredUsage: Default width fills the parent grid/flex column.
Use width="fixed" or size=4col/6col/8col only in component showcases, never generated app routes.
If width and size are both present, width is the authoritative layout mode; size is only a legacy fixed-width preset.
Let the parent grid define responsive column behavior with minmax(0,1fr), clamp rails, and gap-4/gap-5.

components.name: CheckboxControl
recommendedFor: single selection when paired with text
constraints: Pair with a separate span/label text; do not use CheckboxWithLabel.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: Boolean or checklist input without nested label button semantics.
bestFor: single selection when paired with text
requiredUsage: Pair with a separate span/label text; do not use CheckboxWithLabel.

components.name: ContactItem
constraints: Use Forge tokens, inherited parent width, and component props before custom markup.

components.name: DataTable
constraints: Forbidden: Do not pass data=; use rows=.
Forbidden: Do not use onRowClick; navigation belongs in CellLink, CellActions, or StyledLink cell.
Forbidden: Do not use [&_table]:table-fixed on rich operational queues.
Forbidden: Do not wrap in a second large titled SurfaceCard.

Forbidden: Do not write
{name}
as a column render; use CellImageText.
Forbidden: Do not use <Label color="gray"> as the entire cell for a date or numeric value; use CellMuted or CellNumber.

Forbidden: Do not hand-roll

{title}

{subtitle}

; use CellTextSubtitle.
Forbidden: Do not place a raw <ProgressBar/>, <Avatar/>, <Button/>, or <Label/> as the entire column render when a Cell* primitive exists for that field shape.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: Primary surface for business queues, entity lists, audit records, and priority work tables.

fieldRules._priority: ALWAYS pick the matching Forge cell primitive FIRST. Raw Avatar / div / p / span / Label composition inside a DataTable column render is a composition defect, not an acceptable fallback.
fieldRules.identityWithImage: CellImageText (NEVER Avatar + div + p + Label by hand)
fieldRules.mutedText: CellMuted (NEVER <Label color="gray"> as a whole-cell wrapper)
fieldRules.progress: CellProgressBar (NEVER call <ProgressBar/> directly inside a column render)
fieldRules.actions: CellActions or CellKebabMenu (NEVER two stacked text buttons)
fieldRules.linkAction: CellLink (NEVER StyledLink inside a column render)

forbiddenUsage: Do not pass data=; use rows=.
Do not use onRowClick; navigation belongs in CellLink, CellActions, or StyledLink cell.
Do not use [&_table]:table-fixed on rich operational queues.
Do not wrap in a second large titled SurfaceCard.

Do not write
{name}
as a column render; use CellImageText.
Do not use <Label color="gray"> as the entire cell for a date or numeric value; use CellMuted or CellNumber.
Do not place a raw <ProgressBar/>, <Avatar/>, <Button/>, or <Label/> as the entire column render when a Cell* primitive exists for that field shape.

components.name: Datepicker
constraints: Use Forge tokens, inherited parent width, and component props before custom markup.
Do not force fixed pixel width unless explicitly building a component showcase.
components.purpose: Inline date/datetime picker for forms.

components.name: FilterPanel
constraints: Use ToolbarSearchInput, ToolbarSelectDropdown, ToolbarDatepicker, ToolbarPillTabs, or inline controls for first-screen filters before opening a FilterPanel.
Keep FilterPanel as an overlay or secondary refinement surface so it does not push the primary queue below the fold.
Do not use a fixed page-column card to imitate filters when a Toolbar pattern is enough.
components.purpose: Compact advanced filter panel with reset, grouped controls, cancel, and apply actions.

components.name: ListGroup
avoidFor: primary entity queues that need sorting or pagination
constraints: Use ListGroup for compact secondary context, not as a replacement for the main DataTable queue.
Keep items concise; long operational rows belong in DataTable or a split-pane detail surface.
Do not wrap ListGroup in another SurfaceCard.

avoidWhen: primary entity queues that need sorting or pagination

components.name: MediaUpload
constraints: Use Forge tokens, inherited parent width, and component props before custom markup.

components.name: NotificationItem
constraints: Use inside ListGroup or another rail/list container; do not float standalone NotificationItem cards across the page.
Use title as a short operational signal and body as one-line supporting context.
For audit trails with connectors, prefer HistoryItem over NotificationItem.
components.purpose: Dense notification/activity item with tag, time, title, body, unread state, lead icon, and optional mark-read action.

components.name: PageTitleToolbar
recommendedFor: list page heading with compact actions
detail or action page heading below AppLayout breadcrumbs
constraints: Use PageTitleToolbar once near the page root; nested cards and rails should use smaller component titles.
Do not use oversized hero typography for admin page titles; keep title close to sidebar/profile scale.
Do not add extra p-6 or p-8 wrappers around PageTitleToolbar when AppLayout already owns page padding.
components.purpose: Compact page-level title, subtitle, optional eyebrow, and left/right actions for Forge admin pages.
bestFor: list page heading with compact actions
detail or action page heading below AppLayout breadcrumbs
